decisions.reasoning: Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO on Rillaboom, and since I outspeed, I can remove the opponent's threat immediately without taking any damage.
Flutter Mane outspeeds and 2HKOs Tornadus-Therian. Switching to Incineroar provides a safe pivot that resists Flutter Mane's STAB moves and can threaten it with Knock Off or Intimidate support.
Flare Blitz is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, allowing me to remove a major offensive threat immediately without risking a switch-in.
Incineroar has fainted, so I must send in a replacement. Kingambit is the best choice to threaten Flutter Mane with Sucker Punch, as it resists Shadow Ball and can pick off the low-HP Flutter Mane.
Glacial Lance is a guaranteed OHKO on Flutter Mane, removing the opponent's fastest threat immediately regardless of their move choice.

Calyrex-Ice is at 54% and will be outsped and 3HKOed by Urshifu-Rapid, while only dealing chip damage in return. Switching to Tornadus-Therian provides a safe pivot that resists Urshifu's STAB moves and maintains momentum.
Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO on Urshifu-Rapid-Strike. Since I outspeed and have a guaranteed KO, I must take the kill immediately rather than switching.

Tornadus-Therian is at 8% HP and will be KO'd by almost any chip damage or priority move. Since Hurricane is a guaranteed OHKO on Urshifu-Rapid-Strike, taking the guaranteed KO now is the optimal play to remove a major threat.
Tornadus-Therian has fainted, so I must send in a new Pokemon. Amoonguss is the best defensive pivot to handle Urshifu-Rapid-Strike's water/fighting coverage while providing utility.

Calyrex-Ice is significantly slower and cannot secure a KO, while Urshifu-Rapid Strike threatens a 3HKO. Switching to Amoonguss provides a resistance to Water-type moves and allows for potential redirection or status support to handle the threat.
High Horsepower has a higher damage output than Glacial Lance against Urshifu and provides a guaranteed KO given the opponent's 16% HP status, securing the kill before Urshifu can move.
